name: tornhill
description: Critique-led architecture views for Claude Code: a high-altitude, code- and git-grounded system map whose headline output is a findings overlay (hidden coupling, hotspots, SPOFs, performance/efficiency/correctness pains, edge-case risks). Ships a companion /audit skill for security, privacy/compliance, legal, and cost review. Renders to an interactive HTML twin with zoom, click-to-code, and a findings toggle.
